items.title: Wemby choosing a team-building extension reminded me of something Devin Vassell said last season:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Wemby choosing a team-building extension reminded me of something Devin Vassell said last season:

"Vic never comes in and has an ego. He's always worried about the team first and us getting wins and what it takes for us to get wins...

"He sets the example."
